items.title: UFL announces multiple trades involving four quarterbacks, including Matt Corral
items.summary: The UFL used a rare in-season Sunday with no games to make a little news.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: How Haaland and Gabriel went head-to-head in an 'old school battle'
items.summary: Match of the Day pundits Wayne Rooney and Danny Murphy discuss how "two top players" in Erling Haaland and Gabriel went head-to-head in Manchester City's 2-1 victory against Ars...

items.title: James Bracey ton leads Gloucestershire fightback as Lancashire's injury woes deepen
items.summary: Having already lost seamer Ajeet Singh Dale to a hamstring injury on day one, visitors make second substitution when Luke Wells injures his shoulder
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
